templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.shoecarnival.com/content/returns-and-exchanges-FAQs

templates.name: How do I achieve gold status?
templates.content: To achieve GOLD status, you need to spend $200 within the same calendar year.

templates.name: Does my Rewards Certificate expire?
templates.content: Yes, your Rewards Certificate will expire 90 days after it's issued.

templates.name: How will I receive my $10 Reward Certificate?
templates.content: Your reward certificate will always be emailed to you. You will also be able to access your certificate in our mobile app, and they will be listed in your online account.

templates.name: I signed up for Shoe Perks in a store. How do I access my account online?
templates.content: Click on the "My Account" icon towards the upper right corner of the page, and then click on "Register". Fill out the required information and you're all set.

templates.name: When can I pick up my order?
templates.content: Orders are typically ready for pickup within 4 business hours after the order is placed. You will receive an email as soon as it's ready.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://returns.narvar.com/shoecarnival/returns

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $75. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to contact us via this link: https://www.shoecarnival.com/contactus Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us near you here: https://stores.shoecarnival.com/

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at  800-430-7463 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/shoecarnival/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/ShoeCarnival

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help! Our shoes generally run true to size. Would you mind sharing your usual size? I'd also recommend taking a look at our fit guide on each product page.

templates.name: How do I redeem a Shoe Perks Rewards Certificate online?
templates.content: As long as you are logged in to your shoecarnival.com account your available Shoe Perks Reward Certificate will be available to select during the checkout process.

templates.name: I just made a purchase, but I'm not seeing my points in my account
templates.content: Points are updated within 24 hours of in-store purchases or the date of shipment for online orders. If you do not see your points after 24 hours, please contact Customer Service via this link: https://www.shoecarnival.com/contactus

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.shoecarnival.com/orderstatus

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to contact us via this link: https://www.shoecarnival.com/contactus Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Can I have some of my order shipped and some to be picked up in-store?
templates.content: For items you want to be shipped you will select "Add To Bag" on the product page and for the items you want to pick up you will select "Pick Up In-Store".

templates.name: Where in the store can I pick up my order?
templates.content: When you arrive at the store, find a store associate or head to the register to pick up your order. Make sure you have your pick-up email along with a government issued id.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1-2 business days and once shipped it will take 4-7 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: How do I view my points balance?
templates.content: Log into your account on shoecarnival.com and head to your Shoe Perks Rewards section to view your current points balance. Points are updated within 24 hours of in-store purchase or date of shipment for online orders. You can also download our mobile app for account access at your fingertips!

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: We process orders quickly, so you'll need to act fast! Please contact Customer Service at 800-430-SHOE(7463) as soon as possible after placing your order.

templates.name: Military discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! Simply look for the ID.me verification in your cart as you complete your order. Click the "Verify" button and follow the steps!

templates.name: I've earned 200 points. When will I receive my $10 Reward Certificate?
templates.content: You will receive your reward certificate the following day after you reach 200 points. For example, if you reach 200 points on Monday you will receive your certificate on Tuesday.

templates.name: Can I have someone else pick up my order?
templates.content: During checkout you will be able to designate a person to pick up your order. You will just need to provide their name and email address.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.shoecarnival.com/content/shoeperksrewards

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact us via this link: https://www.shoecarnival.com/contactus Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: How do I know if an item can be picked up in a store?
templates.content: While on the product page select the "Pick Up In Store" option and search by your address or zip code. If the "Select Store" option is available next to the listed store you will be able to pick it up in that store. If you're seeing "Out of Stock" next to the listed store, you will need to have the item shipped to your home.

templates.name: Promo Exclusion
templates.content: You can check out our brand exclusions here: https://shoecarnival.attn.tv/a1vwfBQc3hA1
